title: Allowing User Restrictions/Access on Views
excerpt:
Are there any plans to be able to give certain board subscribers access to certain views? 
Different users often have different roles to play and therefore the various views often represent this fact.

posts.author: djbeame (Bernard Wilson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Are there any plans to be able to give certain board subscribers access to certain views?

Different users often have different roles to play and therefore the various views often represent this fact.

posts.author: JohnW (John Waller)
posts.cookedHtml: I believe that kind of functionality is only offered on the Enterprise plan, which is too expensive for most users.
